text:
## Assessment: APPROVED

All acceptance criteria pass:

1. Workspace tests and model validation succeed.
2. The fixed-seed 100k-person test restricts during ticks 10–20 and lowers peak infections versus baseline.
3. The 200-tick test bounds policy mode changes to two.
4. Repeated model comparisons are byte-identical; baseline comparison rows exactly match standalone SIR output.
5. Effective restriction begins exactly one tick after the policy transition fires.
6. Lower-beta parameter contrast produces a strictly lower final attack rate and deterministic output.
7. `docs/examples/sir_policy.md` contains runnable model and parameter comparison commands.

The models preserve infection/recovery rule IDs 0 and 1, so paired runs share identical Philox coordinates. No blocking issues were found.

```json
{"assessment":"APPROVED","blockingIssues":[],"summary":"All PRD 0009 criteria pass: the validated two-box SIR/policy model, deterministic hysteresis, tick-zero neutral modifier, exact one-tick feedback, CRN-aligned comparisons, 100k paired peak test, deterministic parameter contrast, and runnable documentation are implemented and verified."}
```

## Assessment: APPROVED

All acceptance criteria pass:

1. Workspace tests and model validation succeed.
2. The fixed-seed 100k-person test restricts during ticks 10–20 and lowers peak infections versus baseline.
3. The 200-tick test bounds policy mode changes to two.
4. Repeated model comparisons are byte-identical; baseline comparison rows exactly match standalone SIR output.
5. Effective restriction begins exactly one tick after the policy transition fires.
6. Lower-beta parameter contrast produces a strictly lower final attack rate and deterministic output.
7. `docs/examples/sir_policy.md` contains runnable model and parameter comparison commands.

The models preserve infection/recovery rule IDs 0 and 1, so paired runs share identical Philox coordinates. No blocking issues were found.
